title: lead-routing-rules-designer inputs
description: Typed inputs for the lead-routing-rules-designer runtime agent. Machine-readable mirror of the Inputs table in AGENT.md. The harness validates caller-supplied input packets against this schema before the agent begins work; validation failures surface the offending field to the caller rather than failing mid-run.

target_org_alias.description: Example from AGENT.md: `prod` Required column: 'yes for audit'.

lead_sources.description: Example from AGENT.md: `["webform","trade show","partner","outbound"]` Required column: 'yes for design'.

geographies.description: Example from AGENT.md: `["NA","EMEA","APAC","LATAM"]` Required column: 'yes for design'.

sla_minutes_by_source.description: Example from AGENT.md: `{ "webform": 5, "trade show": 60 }` Required column: 'no'.
